antiquelongbow.description: This Tattered Longbow has seen better days like your grandpa's underwear. But hey it still shoots straight. Mostly.

assassinskazoo.name: Assassin's Kazoo (Echoing Flute Dagger)
assassinskazoo.description: Stab them with the sharp end and serenade them with the handle. Because murder should always come with a soundtrack.

bipolarslingshot.name: Bipolar Slingshot
bipolarslingshot.description: The Slingshot of Surprise: half the time it's a critical hit the other half you're just flinging pebbles at giants. Good luck!

bugspraylightercombo.name: Bugspray/Lighter Combo
bugspraylightercombo.description: Because why face your six-legged nightmares up close when you can incinerate them from a safe distance? It's the ultimate in pest control turning annoying bugs into a brief but spectacular fireworks show. Disclaimer: Not recommended for use on siblings no matter how much they bug you.

shrinkwand.name: Shrink Wand
shrinkwand.description: Causes items to shrink in size. Has 10 charges.

echohammer.name: Echo Hammer
echohammer.description: This hammer's so loud it's like the bell at the start of round one. Except there's no round two because your enemy's seeing stars.

hippiebeatingstick.name: Hippie Beating Stick (Quartz-Embedded Staff)
hippiebeatingstick.description: For when you want to beat someone with the power of crystal healing. Feel the vibrations man.

meteormaul.name: Meteor Maul
meteormaul.description: It fell from the sky it's seen more action than your favorite streaming service and it's got a temper hotter than your shower when someone flushes the toilet.

ninemillimeterhandgun.name: 9mm Handgun
ninemillimeterhandgun.description: The 9mm Handgun: because sometimes diplomacy fails and you need to make your point with a bit more... finality. This little beauty is the perfect companion for late-night strolls through zombie-infested alleyways or for those awkward family reunions that could go south. Reliable with enough kick to remind you you're alive and compact enough to not ruin the lines of your outfit.

enchanted_war_gauntlet_of_the_exalted_gr.name: Enchanted War Gauntlet of the Exalted Grull (Right-Handed)
enchanted_war_gauntlet_of_the_exalted_gr.description:
A wrist bracer that transforms into a spiked war gauntlet made of orcish steel when the hand is shaped into a fist or wields a hilted weapon for more than two seconds at a time. This item on its own does not negate the bare knuckle skill bonus. 
 
 Warning: if you use this weapon to strike adherents of the war god Grull, you have a 1.5% chance to transfigure your target into the deity himself. Trust me on this. You don’t want to do that.
 
 A bigger, redder, WARNING. Remove this item before you jerk off.

ogrestoothpick.name: Ogre's Toothpick (a.k.a. Giant Club)
ogrestoothpick.description: So you've decided subtlety's not your style? Swing this tree trunk and play whack-a-mole with anyone who side-eyes you.

pyromaniacpixiestick.name: Pyromaniac Pixie Stick
pyromaniacpixiestick.description: Ember Wand: wave it around set things on fire and then wait awkwardly while it reboots. It's the dial-up internet of wands.

repeatingcrossbowofthescavengermother.name: Repeating Crossbow of the Scavenger Mother
repeatingcrossbowofthescavengermother.description: It is said that the long-forgotten goddess Nekhebit is both jealous and terrible. When the elf mothers chose to abandon Nekhebit and instead worship Apito, the Oak Goddess, it is written Nekhebit grew enraged. The mighty vulture goddess blamed the male-dominated high elf court for causing her worshippers to stray. As a result, she cursed their seed, thus creating what is today known as the Fae Diaspora. There are dozens of elf and fairy breeds, all of whom may trace their lineage back to the early high elf court, whose cursed offspring sowed the universe. This crossbow is rumored to have been given to Nekhebit's last warrior guardian as a gift for remaining true to her faith.

snickersnackclaws.name: Snicker-Snack Claws
snickersnackclaws.description: Why throw a punch when you can throw three... simultaneously? These bad boys are the love children of a Swiss Army knife and a cat fight. Get ready to carve your initials into the dungeon walls – or into your enemies' hide if that's your thing.

spunkyjeffersontheenchantednickelsock.name: Spunky Jefferson the Enchanted Nickel Sock of the Elderly Miser
spunkyjeffersontheenchantednickelsock.description: Almost all cultures that use money have a story about the miser. The elderly solitary man who hoards his wealth and treats everybody around him like shit until he gets his comeuppance and then turns into a big pussy who gives all his money away. All cultures also have the equivalent of the spunk sock that sits underneath a teenage boy's bed. Jefferson is the lifeforce of such a miser who pissed off the spirit who'd come to show him the errors of his ways. He was cursed to inhabit a sock once owned by a kid named Tanner. The sock itself holds several USD worth of nickels. You swing it and bonk people with it. It's unusually effective more so than you might think.

streetsweeper.name: Street Sweeper (Heavy Chain)
streetsweeper.description: The weapon of choice for the sophisticated thug. Swing it around to feel like a total badass or just to compensate for something.

tetanusblade.name: Tetanus Blade (Rusty Shortsword)
tetanusblade.description: Rusty Shortsword? More like an emergency tetanus shot waiting to happen. Use at your own risk and make sure your will is up to date.

toadcudgel.name: Toad Cudgel
toadcudgel.description: Big stick for bonking. Bonk toad. Bonk mob. Bonk girlfriend and drag back to cave by hair.

xistera.name: Xistera
xistera.description: Ever wanted to hurl something so fast it defies physics and common sense? Meet the Xistera, a weapon for those who think 'overkill' is just a word for amateurs. It's a curved throwing tool that's part ancient sport, part modern mayhem. Prepare to bend the laws of nature – and your enemies' spines.

sappers_pick_veryrare.description: An engineering tool turned monstrous weapon, rumored to crack both walls and bones with ease.

spear_veryrare.name: Spear (Very Rare)
spear_veryrare.description: A basic pole weapon mutated with demonic hydra teeth, each thrust unleashing phantom jaws that bite the enemy.

boar_spear_veryrare.name: Boar Spear (Very Rare)
boar_spear_veryrare.description: A spear fused with demon ichor and hydra fangs. Cross-guards manifest writhing phantom heads to latch onto enemies.

harpoon_veryrare.name: Harpoon (Very Rare)
harpoon_veryrare.description: A barbed spear soaked in demon ichor, sprouting ephemeral hydra heads that clamp onto foes and reel them in.

angry_rat_pole_veryrare.name: Angry Rat on a Pole (Very Rare)
angry_rat_pole_veryrare.description: That bizarre contraption is now mutated by hydra magic. The caged rat manifests illusory hydra heads, gnawing at foes from range.

long_spear_veryrare.name: Long Spear (Very Rare)
long_spear_veryrare.description: A towering spear embedded with hydra-teeth shards that lash at multiple foes in wide arcs.

lance_veryrare.name: Lance (Very Rare)
lance_veryrare.description: A lengthy weapon rumored to shatter dimensional barriers on a mounted charge, quaking the battlefield on impact.

pike_veryrare.name: Pike (Very Rare)
pike_veryrare.description: A pike said to have cracked a mountain’s heart. Its unstoppable thrusts can knock cavalry off their mounts in a single strike.

cavalry_lance_veryrare.name: Cavalry Lance (Very Rare)
cavalry_lance_veryrare.description: A specialized lance empowered by meteorite shards. Its devastating charges produce minor quakes upon striking.

mace_veryrare.name: Mace (Very Rare)
mace_veryrare.description: A simple mace now superheated by cosmic forge-flames, scalding metal gear on impact.

studded_mace_veryrare.name: Studded Mace (Very Rare)
studded_mace_veryrare.description: A mace with prominent studs that glow like miniature suns, heating metal armor to unbearable temps.

iron_cudgel_veryrare.name: Iron Cudgel (Very Rare)
iron_cudgel_veryrare.description: A short iron-shod club that channels star-heated pulses, scorching metal gear instantly.

morning_star_veryrare.name: Morning Star (Very Rare)
morning_star_veryrare.description: A spiked mace blazing with the heat of a dying star, able to superheat and warp metal plating.

baseball_bat_veryrare.name: Baseball Bat (Very Rare)
baseball_bat_veryrare.description: An improvised wooden bat now infused with star-fire forging. It glows hot on impact, warping metal gear.

two_by_four_nails_veryrare.name: 2x4 with Nails (Very Rare)
two_by_four_nails_veryrare.description: A plank with nails that now glows with solar forging. Metal gear becomes dangerously hot on contact.

great_mace_veryrare.name: Great Mace (Very Rare)
great_mace_veryrare.description: A two-handed mace that sings with thunderous storms. Bolts of lightning erupt when it hits.

war_mace_veryrare.name: War Mace (Very Rare)
war_mace_veryrare.description: A large two-handed mace that crackles with captive stormclouds, unleashing arcs of lightning with each blow.

long_haft_mace_veryrare.name: Long-Haft Mace (Very Rare)
long_haft_mace_veryrare.description: A two-handed mace with an extended shaft that channels a roiling thunderstorm within.

spiked_heavy_mace_veryrare.name: Spiked Heavy Mace (Very Rare)
spiked_heavy_mace_veryrare.description: A vicious, two-handed mace covered in jagged spikes, humming with electric fury that deafens foes.

claw_hammer_veryrare.name: Claw Hammer (Very Rare)
claw_hammer_veryrare.description: A household hammer surging with earthen power, partially petrifying foes on impact.

warhammer_veryrare.name: Warhammer (Very Rare)
warhammer_veryrare.description: A compact warhammer imbued with golem magic, turning its wielder’s skin to stone-like resilience.

mallet_veryrare.name: Mallet (Very Rare)
mallet_veryrare.description: A light hammer that resonates with geologic power, slowly petrifying limbs on a strong hit.

short_sledge_veryrare.name: Short Sledge (Very Rare)
short_sledge_veryrare.description: A one-handed sledge imbued with a golem’s heart, imparting partial stone-skin and limb petrification to foes.

two_handed_sledge_veryrare.name: Two-Handed Sledge (Very Rare)
two_handed_sledge_veryrare.description: A massive sledgehammer rumored to unmake buildings with a single blow, channeling tectonic might.

heavy_maul_veryrare.name: Heavy Maul (Very Rare)
heavy_maul_veryrare.description: A gigantic hammer with an ancient golem core, delivering continental-shattering blows.

heavy_warhammer_veryrare.name: Heavy Warhammer (Very Rare)
heavy_warhammer_veryrare.description: A reinforced two-handed warhammer rumored to cause localized quakes, shaking enemies off their feet.

grain_flail_veryrare.name: Grain Flail (Very Rare)
grain_flail_veryrare.description: A repurposed farm flail, now infused with a spark of celestial judgment. Each swing resonates with holy might.

iron_flail_veryrare.name: Iron Flail (Very Rare)
iron_flail_veryrare.description: A weighty flail that glimmers with starlight. Undead and fiends especially feel the brunt of its holy starlit punishment.

spiked_flail_veryrare.name: Spiked Flail (Very Rare)
spiked_flail_veryrare.description: A vicious flail brimming with starlight energies, punishing evil creatures while healing allies in bursts of radiance.

chain_flail_veryrare.name: Chain Flail (Very Rare)
chain_flail_veryrare.description: A flail with a lengthening chain of radiant links, able to entangle foes with holy brilliance.

double_headed_flail_veryrare.name: Double-Headed Flail (Very Rare)
double_headed_flail_veryrare.description: A monstrous two-handed flail, each head wreathed in fiery chains from the underworld. It yanks victims into a burning vortex.

war_flail_veryrare.name: War Flail (Very Rare)
war_flail_veryrare.description: A massive flail rumored to be forged in the deepest hells, summoning infernal chains that pull multiple foes into scorching doom.

wooden_baton_veryrare.name: Wooden Baton (Very Rare)
wooden_baton_veryrare.description: A short guard baton brimming with primal storm magic, occasionally lashing foes with vines or lightning.

driftwood_club_veryrare.name: Driftwood Club (Very Rare)
driftwood_club_veryrare.description: A piece of driftwood hammered by countless storms, now crackling with thunderous potential.

hewn_branch_veryrare.name: Hewn Branch (Very Rare)
hewn_branch_veryrare.description: A sturdy branch once touched by a storm elemental, storing crackling lightning within.

studded_stick_veryrare.name: Studded Stick (Very Rare)
studded_stick_veryrare.description: A wooden stick with metal studs now infused by repeated lightning strikes, discharging small bolts on contact.

quarterstaff_veryrare.name: Quarterstaff (Very Rare)
quarterstaff_veryrare.description: A simple staff that pulses with serpentine life, exhaling faint venom with each strike.

iron_banded_staff_veryrare.name: Iron-Banded Staff (Very Rare)
iron_banded_staff_veryrare.description: A wooden staff tightly bound with enchanted iron, each strike injecting potent venom into foes.

hardwood_staff_veryrare.name: Hardwood Staff (Very Rare)
hardwood_staff_veryrare.description: A staff of dense hardwood, thrumming with serpentine magic, extending poisonous vines at will.

walking_staff_veryrare.name: Walking Staff (Very Rare)
walking_staff_veryrare.description: A traveler’s staff that teems with serpentroot energy, coiling around enemies to hinder movement.

iron_chain_veryrare.name: Iron Chain (Very Rare)
iron_chain_veryrare.description: An improvised chain that glows with ectoplasmic light, momentarily sealing foes’ special abilities.

steel_chain_veryrare.name: Steel Chain (Very Rare)
steel_chain_veryrare.description: A hardened chain flickering with ectoplasmic glow, known to bind a foe’s very spirit on contact.

laser_sabre_veryrare.name: Laser Sabre (Very Rare)
laser_sabre_veryrare.description: A refined energy blade of negative photons. Each slash warps gravity, pulling foes helplessly closer.

ion_cutter_veryrare.name: Ion Cutter (Very Rare)
ion_cutter_veryrare.description: An energy blade that disrupts matter with a gravitational twist, ignoring standard armor as it drags foes in.

plasma_sword_veryrare.name: Plasma Sword (Very Rare)
plasma_sword_veryrare.description: A blade of contained plasma that warps gravity around it, pulling in foes for unstoppable strikes.

vibro_blade_veryrare.name: Vibro-Blade (Very Rare)
vibro_blade_veryrare.description: A high-frequency energy blade that bends gravity. Each cut resonates into a micro singularity, ignoring armor easily.

heavy_plasma_greatsword_veryrare.name: Heavy Plasma Greatsword (Very Rare)
heavy_plasma_greatsword_veryrare.description: A two-handed energy weapon whose searing arc can carve multiple foes at once, bathing the battlefield in solar brilliance.

tomahawk_throwing_veryrare.name: Tomahawk (Thrown) (Very Rare)
tomahawk_throwing_veryrare.description: A throwing axe that crackles with skyfire. Lightning arcs to nearby foes mid-flight, returning to the wielder on command.

hatchet_throwing_veryrare.name: Hatchet (Thrown) (Very Rare)
hatchet_throwing_veryrare.description: A short-hafted throwing hatchet wreathed in skyfire, chaining lightning to multiple targets as it spins.

rangers_axe_throwing_veryrare.name: Ranger’s Axe (Thrown) (Very Rare)
rangers_axe_throwing_veryrare.description: A precisely balanced throwing axe dancing with storm sparks, leaping to multiple targets on a single throw.

simple_throwing_knife_veryrare.name: Simple Throwing Knife (Very Rare)
simple_throwing_knife_veryrare.description: A basic throwing blade turned into a shadow-laced weapon that roots enemies in place by pinning their shadows.

balanced_throwing_dagger_veryrare.name: Balanced Throwing Dagger (Very Rare)
balanced_throwing_dagger_veryrare.description: A center-weighted dagger of living shadow that pins foes to the spot by anchoring their shadows.

throwing_spike_veryrare.name: Throwing Spike (Very Rare)
throwing_spike_veryrare.description: A slim spike wreathed in living shadow, expertly weighted to pin multiple foes’ shadows at once.

arcstrider_bow_veryrare.name: Arcstrider Bow (Very Rare)
arcstrider_bow_veryrare.description: A legendary bow woven from storm clouds. Each arrow curves mid-air, striking foes behind cover with lightning speed.

exofang_hand_crossbow_veryrare.name: Exo-Fang Hand Crossbow (Very Rare)
exofang_hand_crossbow_veryrare.description: A small crossbow fused with alien crystal. Bolts expand inside the target, causing severe bleed while bypassing armor.

umbral_ballista_veryrare.name: Umbral Ballista (Very Rare)
umbral_ballista_veryrare.description: A massive two-handed crossbow of blackheart wood. Each bolt cloaks a large area in gloom, draining life from those trapped.
